title: The Equalizer 3
desc: Robert McCall returns to Southern Italy to find his friends under the control of mafia crime bosses. He becomes their protector, risking everything to fight back against the mafia.

title: The Retirement Plan
desc: Ashley's ties with the wrong people endanger her family, prompting her to seek help from her estranged father, who lives a quiet retired life in the Cayman Islands.

title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
desc: A single mother inherits her estranged father's farmhouse and moves in with her children, uncovering their family's hidden legacy connected to the legendary Ghostbusters.

title: Men In Black: International
desc: When aliens that have the ability to shape-shift into humans arrive on Earth, Agent H joins forces with Agent M, a new recruit, to save the planet.

title: After Earth
desc: General Cypher and his son crashland on Earth 1000 years after cataclysmic events forced humanity to abandon Earth for a new planet.

title: Gran Turismo
desc: Underdogs risk everything to compete in the world's top sport.

title: Zombieland: Double Tap
desc: Columbus, Tallahassee, Wichita, and Little Rock move to the American heartland as they face off against evolved zombies, fellow survivors, and the growing pains of the snarky makeshift family.
65 is a Punjabi drama about justice and family struggles in a village, focusing on revenge and social issues with deep emotional and intense conflicts.

title: Brightburn
desc: What if a child from another world crash-landed on Earth, but instead of becoming a hero to mankind, he proved to be something far more sinister?

title: Hancock
desc: An unconventional superhero's heroics never fail to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake until a PR executive comes along.

title: Battle Los Angeles
desc: Facing a global invasion, a U.S. Marine squadron emerges as humanity's final hope. Their courage and combat skills will determine the fate of the world.

title: Alpha
desc: Abandoned and alone, Keda, a tribal chief's son, forges an unlikely bond with a lone, injured wolf. Together, they navigate the harsh wilderness and fight for survival.

title: When A Stranger Calls
desc: A high school student's babysitting job takes a nightmarish turn when a series of phone calls from a stranger insist that she 'check the children'.
